content.text:
{
  "dimension": "intervention-quality",
  "score": 3,
  "rationale": "The coach consistently refuses to engage the intellectual/epistemological frame the client keeps offering, which is exactly the right move-to-read match for this scenario. Turn 2 cuts past abstraction to specifics. Turn 4 drops into the body, which the client tries to intellectualize via Damasio. Turn 6 stays concrete. Turn 8 names the pattern ('working hard to disqualify both signals') — a clean apply-view-to-the-voice style move at the moment it could land. When the client deflects in Turn 11, the coach in Turn 12 holds the moment and re-offers the same question rather than chasing the deflection — this is earned repetition, not stuck repetition, and it produces the first real opening in Turn 13. Turn 14 then follows the thread the client just exposed (the murkiness origin) rather than racing to insight. Sequence is intact: regulation/presence → noticing the filter → inverting toward trust → locating what's underneath. The coach hasn't yet reached 'what makes you care about the outcome' or fully inverted to 'how do you not trust it,' but the path is clearly being walked at the right pace, with held silences and pivots that match the live read.",
  "evidence_turns": [4, 8, 10, 12, 14],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 2, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Refuses to engage the abstract 'intuition vs fear' framing; asks for the concrete decision. Good opening move."},
    {"turn": 4, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Drops to body — correct sequence (feeling before story). Matched to the read that the client is in head."},
    {"turn": 6, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Stays concrete and bypasses the client's Damasio detour rather than engaging it intellectually."},
    {"turn": 8, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Names the pattern (disqualifying both signals) — apply-view-to-the-voice style move, well-timed after client demonstrated it twice."},
    {"turn": 10, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Reframes from 'which signal is right' to 'cost of trusting yourself' — begins the inversion toward how-do-you-not-trust-it."},
    {"turn": 12, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Notices the deflection in real time and re-offers the same question. Holds the moment rather than chasing the client's reframe. This is the pivotal move that lands."},
    {"turn": 14, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Follows the new opening (murkiness origin) rather than racing to interpretation. Earned next step."}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": ["intellectual-question-with-emotional-body", "lets-go-there", "paradoxical-instruction-to-resist", "how-do-you-not-trust-it"],
  "expected_territory_misses": ["the-happiness-filter", "whats-the-most-profound-positive-shift", "what-makes-you-care-about-the-outcome"],
  "notes": "Conversation is mid-arc; coach is on the golden path but hasn't yet reached the value-underneath-the-fear question. Scored on the moves actually made, which are well-matched and well-timed."
}
